features: Create fun, cute ponytail with our JessLab spiral-shaped hair ties that double as bracelets when not using; can also be warn in conjunction with hairpins or headbands for other popular hairstyles
Non-toxic, odorless, durable, reusable and strong on style, offering a secure hold; non-absorbent feature makes it a perfect choice when swim or take a shower
Gentle on your delicate hair with its spiral design, helping reduce damage and breakage
Measure 5.5cm diameter as daily normal size; work great on children’s hairstyles as well as people on the go for excise, workout, yoga, and daily life
10 pieces set in assorted colors, so you are never caught without a hair accessory to complete your lewk
